_doc: Phase D v0.9.0 — config-driven enforce mode for hooks that support warn/block toggle. Strict mode env var AGENT_TOOLKIT_STRICT=1 globally overrides → block. v0.27: stop-gate defaults flipped block→warn to reduce paralysis from stacked Stop hooks. evidence_audit (claims without proof) and invariant_guard (must-keep regex) remain the only hard blockers.

_schema.default: warn|block — applied when per_hook entry not present

_strict_profile_doc: To re-enable strict gates per ADR-006/007, copy enforce_mode.strict.example.json instead, or set AGENT_TOOLKIT_STRICT=1 (overrides everything to block).
